catalyst.event: Tencent Q4 2025 / FY2025 results release — first full quarter showcasing Yuanbao + Hunyuan AI monetization inside Weixin search/ads, plus Marketing Services (ads) growth re-acceleration on AI-driven CTR uplift
catalyst.date_or_window: 2026-03-19 (expected, based on prior-year cadence of mid-March results)
catalyst.source: Tencent IR historical reporting cadence; prior FY2024 results released 2025-03-19

rightIf_conditions: FY2025 Marketing Services revenue growth ≥18% YoY (consensus ~16%)
Q1 2026 results show Marketing Services >20% YoY, confirming AI ad-tech sustained acceleration
Buyback executes ≥HK$100bn in 2026, confirming capital return commitment
wrongIf_conditions: FY2025 Marketing Services revenue growth <15% YoY (deceleration from Q3 2025 17%)
Non-IFRS operating margin contracts QoQ for two consecutive quarters in 2026
AI capex guidance for 2026 exceeds RMB 130bn without offsetting revenue traction → ROIC compression dominates narrative
Major regulatory action against Weixin commerce or AI services
what_changes_our_mind: Q4 2025 Marketing Services revenue growth decelerates below 15% YoY AND non-IFRS operating margin contracts QoQ — would invalidate the AI-monetization-driving-margins thesis.
variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes Tencent is a 12% EPS compounder at 15x P/E → We believe AI-monetization-in-Weixin drives FY2026 EPS 5-8% above consensus → Mechanism is AI-ad-tech eCPM uplift dropping to operating margin with near-zero marginal cost.
time_to_resolution: 9-12 months — FY2025 results (Mar 2026) and Q1/Q2 2026 prints

expected_pnl_asymmetry.downside_if_wrong: -12% to -15% (HK$420-440 fair-value floor on game franchise + buyback support)

quantification.metric_target: FY2026 non-IFRS net income (RMB bn) and resulting fwd P/E multiple
quantification.current_value: Consensus FY2026E non-IFRS NI ~RMB 255bn; current fwd P/E ~15x
quantification.predicted_value: Our FY2026E non-IFRS NI ~RMB 270-275bn (+6% vs consensus); target fwd P/E 18-19x post-rerating
